name: Engagement Hub
description: Citizen engagement hub with dashboards, petitions, voting, and threaded comments. Primary entry point for civic participation platforms enabling residents to track and influence local decisions.

page_briefs.home: Citizen dashboard greets the resident with a KPI grid highlighting active petitions, upcoming votes, trending issues, and personal participation stats. An activity feed streams recent neighborhood decisions, official responses, and comment replies. Below, a content card grid surfaces recommended petitions, upcoming public meetings, and open service requests tailored to the citizen's district.
page_briefs.petitions: Petition discovery page with a search-filter bar supporting keyword search plus filters for category, district, status (gathering/active/closed), and signature progress. Below, a content card grid renders each petition as a card with title, excerpt, signature count, progress bar toward goal, deadline, and category tag.
page_briefs.petition-detail: Dedicated petition view leads with a featured petition card containing title, full description, author, target official, signature goal, deadline, and primary sign button. A voting-breakdown bars chart visualizes support by district or demographic. Below, a threaded comment section lets citizens debate the proposal with nested replies, reactions, and official responses pinned to the top.

shells.top-nav-main: Top navigation with civic sections and main content area
